title: Storage format is JSONL only
content: Memory source of truth is .ctxmem/memory.jsonl (append-only, committed to git). index.db is a derived SQLite FTS5 index, git-ignored and rebuilt with 'ctxmem sync'. Never edit or commit index.db.

title: Keyword search is the stable default
content: Default search mode is keyword (SQLite FTS5, zero dependencies). semantic and hybrid modes (Ollama + sqlite-vec) are BETA/experimental and under active testing; recall falls back to keyword if the backend is unavailable.

title: Zero required core dependencies
content: The core has no third-party dependencies. Optional extras: mcp, semantic, bench. Requires Python 3.8+ with SQLite FTS5 support.

title: Git Flow branching model
content: Use Git Flow: main (released code) and develop (integration). feature/* and bugfix/* branch from and merge into develop; hotfix/* branches from main and merges into both main and develop. See CONTRIBUTING.md.

title: Memory is shared via git
content: Root .gitignore ignores only .ctxmem/index.db so that .ctxmem/memory.jsonl and .ctxmem/config.json are committed. Contributors pull them and get the same project context; the index rebuilds locally with 'ctxmem sync'.

title: Project layout
content: CLI: src/ctxmem/cli.py. Storage: store.py. Retrieval/search: retrieval.py. MCP server: mcp_server.py. Embeddings (beta): embeddings.py. Code indexer: indexer.py. Benchmark: bench.py. Git helpers: gitinfo.py.

title: MCP server integration
content: Console script ctxmem-mcp exposes recall/remember/memory_status tools to AI agents. Wire it up with 'ctxmem agent-init --mcp' which writes .vscode/mcp.json. Agent instructions live in .github/copilot-instructions.md (and AGENTS.md for Codex).

title: Dev setup, tests and release
content: Dev install: pip install -e ".[all]". No automated test suite yet; validate changes by running the CLI (init -> remember -> sync -> recall). Release: bump version in pyproject.toml and src/ctxmem/__init__.py, PR develop->main, tag vX.Y.Z (SemVer).

title: Repository and license
content: Repository: https://github.com/DoppiaG93/ctxmem. License: MIT. Current version: 0.1.0.
